topic: There is a clean rectangle on my garage floor where a second car has been parked but I own one car
title: There Is a Clean Rectangle on My Garage Floor Where a Second Car Has Been Parked | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a clean rectangle on my garage floor, the shape of a car. I have only ever owned one.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a clean car shaped rectangle on a dusty concrete garage floor, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Two car garage. I park on the left. The right side has always been empty.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a two car garage interior, one car on the left, the right bay empty, dim bulb light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a thin layer of dust on an empty garage floor bay, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning the dust on the right was wiped clean. A car sized rectangle.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a clean rectangle wiped into garage floor dust, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of fresh oil drops on bare concrete in the center of a garage bay, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Four tire marks. A car had been parked there overnight.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of four faint tire marks on a garage floor, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I locked the garage and kept the only key.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand locking a garage side door with a key, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next dawn, the rectangle was warmer, the oil fresh, faint exhaust in the air.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a fresh oil patch on concrete with faint exhaust haze, dim dawn light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each night the unseen car returns. I hear a door shut and an engine ticking.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dim empty garage bay at night, a faint shadow as if a car sits there, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night headlights swept the wall from the empty bay. Nothing was casting them.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of headlight beams sweeping a garage wall from an empty bay, no car present, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I parked my own car in the right bay to fill the space.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a car parked in the right garage bay, dim bulb light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning my car was on the left again. The right bay was clean, and warm.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a clean warm rectangle on a garage floor, the car gone, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
